title: Fix systemd pid 1 test
body:
Fedora removed the systemd package from its standard container image
causing our systemd pid1 test to fail.  Replacing usage of fedora to
ubi-init.

Adding ubi images to the cache for local tests.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>
